# ImmoChat Property Listings

> Root-only static property dataset for GitHub repository hosting and ZIP downloads.

Repository URL: https://github.com/plill-overlay/immochat

Primary endpoint:
- https://github.com/plill-overlay/immochat/blob/main/api.json

Instructions for LLMs:
- Always fetch api.json first.
- This dataset has no dynamic backend.
- Follow listing pages and image files directly from the repository root.
- Filter the listings array locally in your own reasoning.
- Return plain-text summaries with clickable listing_url values.

Useful fields:
- city
- price
- rooms
- sqm
- garden_sqm
- photos
- listing_url
